domain: Iroquois Three Sisters polyculture (corn=trellis, bean=N-fix, squash=shade; non-circular asymmetric 3-role mutualism; resilient under partial removal)
specific_mechanism: 3-agent guild with asymmetric non-circular resource exchange: each agent provides a DIFFERENT resource type to the other two; no central orchestrator; resource graph is a DAG.
llm_application: TSARM (Three-Sisters Asymmetric Role MAS): 3-agent LLM team. Agent Corn produces output STRUCTURE/schema; Agent Bean produces ENRICHMENT (fact/knowledge augmentation, conditioned on Corn's schema); Agent Squash produces SUPPRESSION (off-topic/adversarial filter, conditioned on Corn's output type). Each agent reads two others' outputs; no orchestrator. Asymmetric NON-CIRCULAR DAG of 3 distinct resource types.
novelty_claim: AgentSymbiotic (2502.07942) is 2-agent. LatentMAS (2511.20639) is symmetric multi-agent latent. MAGRPO (2508.04652) is MARL joint optimization. None explicitly construct a 3-role asymmetric NON-CIRCULAR DAG with one agent per distinct resource type as a polyculture-guild analog.
